message:
Fix race conditions and improve resource cleanup

store.ts - Atomic state updates:
- Refactor toggleOverlay to use functional set() for atomic update
- Prevents race conditions when toggle called rapidly
- Inline openOverlay logic to avoid nested get() calls
- setOverlayData now merges with existing data atomically

SqlJsRepository.ts - Statement cleanup safety:
- Wrap statement execution in try-finally block
- Ensures stmt.reset() is always called, even on exceptions
- Prevents statement resource leaks on query errors
- Add null check for row before pushing to results

CanvasSequenceGridRenderer.ts - Timer cleanup:
- Set scrollEndTimer to null after clearTimeout
- Ensures dispose() is idempotent and timer state is consistent

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
